text:
20th and 21st year. The conjunction of Venus
with Jupiter and Mercury indicates that his wife will be well educated, well
behaved and religious . .T he native will benefit by his wife's good fortune.
Jupiter indicating sweet taste, Venus indicating sour taste and Mercury
indicating business are posited in the second house from Saturn. This
indicates that the native will ran a business dealing in rice, sugar etc. The
native will not see any good fortune till his 27th year.
During his 27th year, the native will get help from a new source and run
his business in a big city. As Mercury, Jupiter and Venus are in Gemini, it
is indicated that he will gain much profit through this business in a big city.
Venus is. in conjunction with Jupiter and Mercury and has debilitated
Mars in his second house. This indicates that the native will have three or four
dahghters and two sons.
Between his 31st and 32nd year, the native will buy a new house and
possess vehicles.
